\section*{Always-marginal flavor-singlet operators (finite $N$)}

Operators built from chiral matter fields with $R[O]=2$ at every $N\in\{10,20,30\}$ (numerical $a$-maximization, $|R-2|<10^{-6}$). Flavor singlets are candidates for exactly marginal deformations; non-singlets would generate flavor-current beta functions.

Total theories with at least one always-marginal flavor singlet: \textbf{367} of \textbf{386} reporting any marginal.
